ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* References stocks.stock_id */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, file, database) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, executive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* References users.user_id */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* References stocks.stock_id */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price threshold that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is enabled or not */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last date and time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the market indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Current value of the market indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market indicator value */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* References external_data_sources.source_id */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)
